hyperedges.label: Bulk drag-paint gesture system
hyperedges.description: The drag-to-select system: Dashboard wires bulkMode + orderRef + isSelected/setSelected into useBulkDragPaint, exposes data-drag-boundary/data-bulk-mode/data-paint-engaged on the boundary, and is exhaustively covered by bulkDragPaint.test.tsx including the 250ms long-press gate and scroll preventer.

hyperedges.label: Release & changelog pipeline
hyperedges.description: Pending .changes/*.md changesets are aggregated by release.ts into src/data/changelog.ts and package.json is bumped; Changelog.test.tsx asserts every release entry renders on the /changelog page.

hyperedges.label: Prerender mount handshake
hyperedges.description: main.tsx writes data-rendered='1' on requestAnimationFrame after the React tree mounts; prerender.mjs polls for that exact attribute then captures HTML, strips theme/marker, writes dist/index.html so crawlers see real content.

hyperedges.rationale: All six hooks live under MuleDetailDrawer/hooks and are composed by MuleDetailDrawer; the smoke test enumerates them as the per-hook test partition.
useSlateActions invokes pill.clickCanonical / notifyWeeklyToggle / notifyReset to clear the customClicked override at the right moments per usePresetPill's contract.

hyperedges.label: Roster card height + layout contract
hyperedges.rationale: These tests jointly pin the aspect-ratio 3/4, 120px min-height, and grid staircase contract across MuleCharacterCard, AddCard, and the roster grid.

hyperedges.label: Bulk-delete mode UX
hyperedges.rationale: Bulk action bar, bulk-mode card behavior, and shared bulk-slide animation form a single UX surface.

hyperedges.label: Recharts theming pipeline
hyperedges.rationale: ChartContainer provides config + injects ChartStyle's --color-<key> CSS vars consumed by tooltip/legend; IncomePieChart tests parse those vars.

hyperedges.name: App-level state providers triad
hyperedges.summary: Three sibling React context providers all using the same pattern: localStorage-backed state, optional defaultX prop for tests, throw-on-misuse hook.

hyperedges.name: Boss Slate invariant pipeline
hyperedges.summary: MuleBossSlate.from runs validateBossSelection (one winner per (bossId, cadence)) then trimWeeklies (cap at WEEKLY_CRYSTAL_CAP=14).

hyperedges.name: World data + World Lens
hyperedges.summary: WORLDS data backs findWorld + isWorldId; lensMules and resolveWorldGroup are pure React-agnostic helpers; WorldProvider is the runtime selector that drives Mule scoping.

hyperedges.label: Persistence pipeline (load/save/flush)
hyperedges.rationale: useMules → createMuleStore → muleMigrate / defaultStoragePort form the read-validate-debounce-write pipeline.

hyperedges.label: Delete with undo toast
hyperedges.rationale: useMuleActions composes useMules deletes with toast.success containing restoreMule action.

hyperedges.label: Income aggregation surface
hyperedges.rationale: Together they form the format-aware Potential Income public API.

hyperedges.label: Worker character-lookup pipeline
hyperedges.summary: GET /api/character/:name?worldId=… composes name validation + worldId map + Nexon adapter + round-trip sanity into one orchestrated request.

hyperedges.label: Provider shell for unit tests
hyperedges.summary: Custom render() composes the four required providers so component tests match production context shape.

hyperedges.label: Six supported MapleStory worlds
hyperedges.summary: Heroic (Kronos/Hyperion/Solis) + Interactive (Bera/Scania/Luna) split across NA and EU datacenters with rebootIndex 1 vs 0.

nodes.label: ADR 0002: Slate-Key Validation Stays in MuleBossSlate.from
nodes.norm_label: adr 0002: slate-key validation stays in mulebossslate.from

links.source_location: Decision 4 SHA-256 hash for inline script
